content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886


September 16, 2003


Brian T. Hildreth
Bell, McAndrews, Hiltachk & Davidian
455 Capitol Mall, Suite 801
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-150

Dear Mr. Hildreth:

This correspondence is written confirmation that your request for advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act¹ has been withdrawn.

As of this date, you have been unable to supply the information requested to complete our analysis. Should these facts become available, please resubmit your advice request.

If you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

[handwritten signature]

By: Trish Mayer
Political Reform Consultant
Technical Assistance Division

TM:jg


1 Government Code sections 81000- 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.

sections.analysis: . Should these facts become available, please resubmit your advice request.
sections.question_synthetic: The requestor sought advice under the Political Reform Act, but the specific legal question is not detailed in this withdrawal notice.
sections.parsing_notes: Format: ocr; LLM: Withdrawal letter with no QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections. Document confirms withdrawal due to incomplete information submission. Dated September 16, 2003.

embedding.qa_text: QUESTION: The requestor sought advice under the Political Reform Act, but the specific legal question is not detailed in this withdrawal notice.

embedding.summary: The FPPC withdrew an advice request (File No. W-03-150) from Brian T. Hildreth because the requestor failed to supply necessary information needed to complete the analysis.
